entities.name: PIGEONPEA

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: Sorghum vulgare Pers., a cereal crop used in intercropping systems

entities.description: Pennisetum typhoides S. and H., a crop with high initial weed smothering ability

entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: Lea mays L., a crop with high initial weed smothering ability

entities.name: COWPEA
entities.description: Vigna sinensis Savi., a crop with weed smothering ability

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: Archis hypogaea L., a crop with weed smothering ability

entities.name: CASTOR
entities.description: Ricinus communis L., a crop that is a poor competitor with weeds

entities.name: CELOSIA ARGENTEA
entities.description: A hardy and tall weed predominant in groundnut systems

entities.name: ACANTHOSPERMUM HISPIDUM
entities.description: A hardy and tall weed predominant in groundnut systems

entities.name: DIGITARIA SANGUINALIS
entities.description: A hardy and tall weed predominant in groundnut systems

entities.name: CROP-WEED BALANCE
entities.description: The equilibrium between crop growth and weed growth influenced by management factors

entities.name: WEED GROWTH
entities.description: The extent of weed development and biomass production

entities.name: REPRODUCTIVE YIELDS
entities.description: The yield of seeds or fruits for both crops and weeds

entities.name: INTERCROPPING
entities.description: The practice of growing two or more crops simultaneously on the same piece of land

entities.name: COMPETITIVE ABILITY
entities.description: The capacity of a crop to compete with weeds for resources

entities.name: PLANT POPULATION PRESSURE
entities.description: The density of plants per unit area in a cropping system

entities.name: ROW ARRANGEMENT PATTERNS
entities.description: The spatial organization of crop rows in a field

entities.name: WEED INFESTATION
entities.description: The presence and severity of weed growth within a crop

entities.name: WEED DRY MATTER WEIGHT
entities.description: The mass of weed biomass after moisture removal

entities.name: HY3A
entities.description: A compact genotype of pigeonpea

entities.name: ST1
entities.description: A spreading type genotype of pigeonpea

entities.name: WEED SMOTHERING ABILITY
entities.description: The ability of a crop canopy to suppress weed growth by blocking light

entities.name: INTEGRATED WEED MANAGEMENT SYSTEMS
entities.description: A holistic approach to weed control combining biological, cultural, and physical factors
